title: COPY INTO using a schema fails
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test (column1 TEXT NOT NULL, column2 INTEGER DEFAULT 0);
CREATE TABLE abc_test (column1 TEXT, column2 DATE);
INSERT INTO test (column1, column2) VALUES ('example', NULL);
INSERT INTO abc_test (column1, column2) SELECT column1, column2 FROM test WHERE column2 IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: COPY INTO with schema causes failure
